maintenance.title: Swapping the Cassette
maintenance.description: We're doing a quick mechanical. The server will be back on the road shortly.

notFound.title: Wrong Turn!
notFound.description: Oops, looks like you took the wrong turn. This route doesn't exist — head back and find the right trail.

llm.upsellBody: AI features on this server require a subscription — or connect your own AI model in Settings.
llm.upsellContactAdmin: Contact the administrator to get access.

access.label: AI access
access.included: AI features are included on this server.
access.none: AI features are not available — subscribe or add your own AI server.
access.inertHint: This uses the server's AI model, which isn't available to you right now. The setting stays saved and resumes once you subscribe or add your own AI server.
